Class HillClimbingAssistant

Namespace
ISILab.LBS.Plugin.Core.AI.Assistant
Assembly
LBS.dll
[RequieredModule(new Type[] { typeof(TileMapModule), typeof(ConnectedTileMapModule), typeof(SectorizedTileMapModule), typeof(ConnectedZonesModule), typeof(ConstrainsZonesModule) })]
public class HillClimbingAssistant : LBSAssistant, ICloneable, IAssistantThreaded
